description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this simple top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of shorts and flip flops. Product Details Peachy pink top, has a mandarin collar with a split V neckline, half buttoned placket, short sleeves with decorative buttoned flaps, a patch pocket on your left chest with a buttoned flap and elasticated hemline Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
